overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player character crosses busy streets, walks past the NCPD station and crowded market stalls, gazes up at towering skyscrapers with monorail tracks overhead, and explores narrow service alleys with vending machines and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian market with food stalls under overpass

events.description: crossing yellow striped crosswalk into covered pedestrian market area
passing food stalls with green neon lighting on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and entering the covered market area with food vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food stall with green neon lighting and zebra-print walls

futuristic police station structure with blue NCPD signage
orange and white striped vendor canopy with steam rising
pink neon advertisement billboard with bright glowing text

segments.scene_description: The segment begins crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk into a covered market area beneath an overpass. The NCPD station is visible ahead while food stalls with neon lighting line the left side. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts and elevated transit

events.description: turning slightly left to follow the curved sidewalk path
moving into bright sunlight area with strong lens flare from above

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past various pedestrians and storefronts, glancing at signs

notable_agents.action: woman in black and white checkered outfit standing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow neon signage for Masala Studios on dark building facade
futuristic elevated train track structure spanning overhead
red neon sign with KABAYAN text on building side

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit downtown sidewalk with the NCPD station now to the right. Elevated monorail tracks run overhead while neon signs for Masala Studios and Kabayan illuminate the buildings. Palm trees line the street and pedestrians move in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at skyscrapers and overhead monorail tracks
crossing the street at crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering buildings and billboards, then crossing the street with a group

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket and red pants crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: tall building with large DATA INC signage and glass facade
transit station entrance with NCART illuminated signage
building with yellow ZETNA signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers and bright sunlight glaring between buildings. After admiring the vertical cityscape, the player crosses the street toward the DATA INC building and NCART station, passing other pedestrians in the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with vending machines and trash accumulation

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with reduced lighting and enclosed walls
passing by people sitting on benches against the alley wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, passing vending machines and small groups of people resting on benches

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on concrete benches against the wall

entered.detail: row of automated vending machines with glowing orange and blue displays
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked against the building wall
red neon sign with joker face design on wall
tight corridor walls with graffiti and weathered surfaces

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow service alley with the ZETNA building on the right. The space is more enclosed with artificial lighting replacing sunlight. Vending machines and trash piles line the right wall while people sit on benches to the left. The atmosphere shifts from open commercial plaza to intimate urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling covered market into the towering heights of a neon metropolis, eventually descending into a secluded service alley. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk into a crowded market area beneath an overpass, passing neon-lit food stalls with the NCPD station visible ahead. As the camera moves onto a sunlit downtown sidewalk, the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and elevated monorail tracks running above signs for Masala Studios and Kabayan. The perspective then tilts upward to capture the glare of the sun between towering skyscrapers before crossing the street toward the DATA INC building and NCART station. Finally, the scene shifts from the open commercial plaza into a narrow, enclosed service alley beside the ZETNA building, where artificial lighting replaces the sunlight among vending machines and trash piles.
